hero.description: Experience the timeless beauty of Balinese craftsmanship through our authentic handmade collection, where every piece reflects quality, tradition, and cultural heritage.

about.title: Crafting Balinese Heritage Since 1997
about.paragraph1: Ani's Collection was founded in 1997 with a passion for sharing authentic Balinese handicrafts with the world. Starting as a family-owned workshop in Bali, we have grown into a trusted destination for handcrafted art loved by customers across many countries.
about.paragraph2: Every piece is carefully handmade by skilled local artisans using traditional techniques passed down through generations. We are committed to preserving Bali's rich cultural heritage while delivering quality craftsmanship and timeless designs.
